description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The bezel is moderately thick and features a subtle, angular design, giving the monitor a modern and professional appearance. The monitor is supported by a broad, angular stand with a sturdy base, which appears to be made of hard plastic. The rear panel includes a label with technical information and possibly some ventilation grilles, but no visible ports or buttons. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet durable build, typical of contemporary desktop monitors. The color scheme is predominantly black, with a small green indicator light on the front bezel.
description: A modern, matte black computer monitor with a rectangular screen, thick bezel, and a wide, angular stand. The rear panel features a label, and the overall design is sleek and professional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display, thick matte black bezel, and a small green indicator light at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monitor's slim profile and the angular, sturdy stand extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with a central label, subtle venting details, and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the monitor's thinness and the depth of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with sharp, angular corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides and features a small green indicator light at the bottom center.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal with a flat, trapezoidal base, constructed from hard black plastic. It appears sturdy and stable, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single button, likely the power button, is visible at the bottom center of the front bezel, indicated by a small green light.
attribute_brand_logo: A small logo or label is present at the bottom center of the front bezel, just above the stand, with green text. There is also a label on the rear panel.
